## Problem
A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.

Example: "I want to integrate WarpVector with Supabase, but there's no built-in adapter for it."

## Proposed Solution
Describe what you'd like to see implemented.

## Use Case
Explain how this feature would be used in practice.

```typescript
// Example of how the feature might look in code
```

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any alternative approaches?

## Additional Context
Add any other context, links to relevant discussions, or references.
